no-missing-null-handler.description: Decision elements must handle null/else paths explicitly.

no-orphaned-elements.description: Every element must be reachable from the Start node.

no-hardcoded-ids.description: Flows must not contain hard-coded Salesforce record IDs.

no-missing-fault-path.description: DML operations and HTTP callouts must have a Fault connector.

api-version.description: Flows should target API version 58 or higher.

no-inactive-flows.description: Inactive flows should not be deployed unless they are templates.

flow-naming-convention.description: Flow API names must use PascalCase.
